hooks.command: cd backend && python -m pytest tests/ -x --timeout=60 -q 2>&1 | tail -5 || (echo '{"block": true, "message": "Backend tests failing. Fix before commit."}' 1>&2 && exit 2)
echo '{"block": true, "message": "Destructive rm -rf blocked. Use targeted file deletion."}' 1>&2 && exit 2
echo 'Reminder: run make test before committing'
